filesystemLimitation: Final files are read through identity-checked no-follow descriptors. Node does not expose openat path walking here, and staging copies occur after validation; the transaction owner must guard ancestor replacement and bind copied bytes to validated bytes.
networkLimitation: Static validation approves exact declared endpoint identities only. It does not resolve DNS or attest connection-time addresses; the MCP client retains DNS, rebinding, redirect, and egress enforcement.
